metadata.title: PRONOS.CLUB — Transparent Sports Predictions
metadata.description: Follow a verified tipster's predictions. Transparent statistics, full history, proven ROI.

home.hero_subtitle: Receive our selections. Check our results. Everything is transparent.
home.results_subtitle: All results are public and verifiable
home.how_step1_desc: Free sign-up in 30 seconds. Access free predictions immediately.
home.how_step2_desc: Push notification or email as soon as a new prediction is published. Never miss a pick.
home.how_step3_desc: Complete history, detailed statistics and verifiable performance in real time.
home.why_transparency_desc: Screenshot of every ticket published before the match. Results are locked and cannot be modified once entered.
home.why_stats_desc: Win rate, ROI, profit: everything is calculated automatically and publicly visible to all visitors.
home.why_notif_desc: Receive a push alert or email as soon as a pick is published. Never miss an opportunity.
home.why_bankroll_desc: Set up your bankroll and unit value. Fixed stake or % of bankroll, with automatic tracking in euros and units.
home.why_no_commitment_desc: Monthly subscription cancellable in one click from your space. No tricks, no fine print.
home.why_multisport_desc: Football, tennis, basketball, hockey and more. The best opportunities regardless of the sport.
home.space_subtitle: A complete dashboard to manage your predictions like a pro
home.space_select_desc: Choose the predictions you actually play. One click is all it takes to add them to your personal tracker.
home.space_bankroll_desc: Set up your bankroll, unit value and management mode. Track your profits in euros or units.
home.space_stats_desc: Win rate, ROI, profit — in units and euros. Toggle with one click. Calculated only on picks you followed.
home.space_history_desc: View only the picks you followed with the same filters as public history. Compare yourself to the tipster.
home.space_notif_desc: Push, email, Telegram — configure your alerts so you never miss a new prediction.
home.space_telegram_desc: Access the exclusive discussion group for subscribers. Share, discuss and grow with the community.
home.faq_a1: Yes. Every prediction is published with a ticket screenshot before the match. Results are entered after the match and cannot be modified. Everything is verifiable in the history.
home.faq_q2: Can I cancel at any time?
home.faq_a2: Yes. The subscription is monthly and cancellable in one click from your personal space. No commitment, no hidden fees.
home.faq_a3: The tipster publishes picks in units (1U, 2U...). You can follow in units only, or set up your own bankroll in your space: fixed stake per unit or percentage of bankroll. Everything is calculated automatically.
home.faq_a4: Enable push notifications in your browser and/or email alerts from your space. You'll receive each pick as soon as it's published.
home.faq_a5: Yes, free picks are real predictions selected with the same rigor. Premium gives access to all selections and the exclusive Telegram group.
home.faq_q6: How does the Telegram group work?
home.faq_a6: When you become Premium, you automatically receive a personal invitation link to join the exclusive Telegram group. Chat with other members and the tipster. Access is linked to your subscription: if you cancel, you are automatically removed from the group.
home.cta_desc_premium: You have access to all premium predictions.
home.cta_desc_logged: Go Premium to access all our selections.

subscription.error_portal: Unable to access the management portal
subscription.error_server: Unable to contact the payment server
subscription.faq_a1: Payment is secured via Stripe. Your card is charged €20 each month on the anniversary of your sign-up. No banking information is stored on our site.
subscription.faq_q2: Can I cancel at any time?
subscription.faq_a2: Yes. Click 'Manage my subscription', then 'Cancel'. You keep Premium access until the end of the paid period. No cancellation fees.
subscription.faq_a3: Your account reverts to the free version. Your data is kept (history, stats, bankroll). Access to the Premium Telegram group is automatically removed. You can resubscribe at any time.
subscription.faq_a4: No. Predictions are opinions based on the tipster's sports analysis. Sports betting involves a risk of loss. Visit our Responsible Gambling page for more information.

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.subtitle: Detailed tipster performance
statistics.no_data: Not enough data for this period

tipster.hero_subtitle: No promises. No dreams. A rigorous method, serious analysis, and a clear goal: profitability in the medium and long term.
tipster.jerome_desc: Professional bettor for over 10 years. Jérôme analyzes every sporting event rigorously, cross-referencing statistical data, team compositions, dynamics, and market odds. He only publishes a prediction when he identifies real value — not just to publish.
tipster.platform_desc: PRONOS.CLUB is not just a blog or a Telegram channel. It's a complete custom-built web platform: real-time prediction tracking, detailed statistics, personalized bankroll management, verifiable and transparent history. Every ticket is screenshotted, every result is locked. Nothing can be modified after the fact. Technology serves transparency.
tipster.philo1_title: We don't promise to win every prediction
tipster.philo1_desc: No tipster in the world wins 100% of their bets. Anyone who promises that is lying to you. Our goal is a consistent success rate and proven long-term profitability, not a sprint of fleeting wins.
tipster.philo2_desc: If you're looking for a tipster who announces "+50 units per month" or "get rich in 3 months", you're in the wrong place. Sports betting is a high-variance investment — there are ups and downs. The difference between a profitable bettor and a loser is discipline and method over time.
tipster.philo3_desc: Every prediction is published with a ticket screenshot before the match. Results are public, statistics are calculated automatically, and nothing can be modified after the fact. You can verify every pick in the history. This is the foundation of our credibility.
tipster.philo4_desc: Our goal is to deliver the best selections with a positive ROI month after month. No "all-in" bets, no martingale, no reckless risk-taking. Sound bankroll management and rigorous selection — that's what makes the difference.
tipster.method1_desc: Each selection is based on thorough analysis: team form, head-to-head records, advanced statistics, likely lineups. Nothing is left to chance.
tipster.method2_desc: Jérôme only bets when he identifies value — meaning when the bookmaker's odds are higher than the actual probability of the event. This is the key to long-term profitability.
tipster.method3_desc: Predictions are placed on whichever bookmaker offers the best odds at the time. That's why it's essential to sign up with all 6 bookmakers we recommend.
tipster.method4_desc: Quality over quantity. Jérôme only publishes picks he truly believes in. No filler, no bets just for volume. Every pick counts.
tipster.format_simple_desc: One event, one selection. The safest and most common format. Risk is controlled, winnings are proportional to the odds. The foundation of sound bankroll management.
tipster.format_combi_desc: Two selections combined in one bet. Odds multiply, increasing potential winnings. We limit to 2 selections maximum to keep risk at a reasonable level. No 5, 10 or 15-leg accumulators here.
tipster.format_combi_example: PSG Win + Real Madrid Win · Odds 2.70 · Stake 1U
tipster.format_combi_warning: Maximum 2 selections per accumulator — never more. Discipline also means knowing how to limit risk.
tipster.guide_subtitle: Everything you need to know to get started and maximize your returns
tipster.guide1_desc: Each published prediction includes: the sport, the event, the selection, the odds, the stake in units (0.5U to 3U), and the recommended bookmaker. A screenshot of the actual ticket is attached to prove the bet was placed before the match.
tipster.guide2_desc: Each prediction indicates minimum odds. This is the threshold below which the bet no longer has value. If your bookmaker's odds are lower than the indicated minimum, do not play this pick. The prediction's value relies on the odds — without them, the bet is no longer profitable.
tipster.guide2_example: Example: if the pick says "PSG ML @ 1.85 — min odds 1.70", don't play if your bookmaker offers less than 1.70. Look for the odds on another bookmaker or skip this one.
tipster.guide3_desc: All our predictions are published in units (U). One unit represents a percentage of your bankroll that you set yourself in your personal space. Stakes range from 0.5U (low confidence) to 3U (very high confidence).
tipster.guide4_desc: In your personal space, you can set up:
tipster.guide4_f1: Your bankroll and unit value (fixed stake or % of bankroll)
tipster.guide4_f2: Select the picks you actually play for personalized tracking
tipster.guide4_f3: View your personal stats in units or euros — toggle with one click
tipster.guide4_f4: Configure your notifications (push, email) to never miss anything
tipster.guide4_f5: Compare your performance to the tipster's
tipster.guide5_title: Place the bet on the right bookmaker
tipster.guide5_desc: Each prediction indicates which bookmaker the odds were taken from. You can bet on that bookmaker or look for better odds elsewhere — that's why it's essential to be signed up with all 6 bookmakers. Always compare odds before placing your bet.
tipster.volume_subtitle: Volume is important to smooth out variance and maximize opportunities. New selections are published every day.
tipster.volume_free_desc: Access a selection of free predictions published each week. Enough to discover our method and verify our results.
tipster.volume_premium_desc: All predictions — over 50 per month. This is where profitability is built, with volume and consistency.
tipster.volume_disclaimer: Volume may vary depending on the sports calendar. We prefer not to publish rather than publish a bad pick.
tipster.variance_p1: Variance is the natural fluctuation of results in the short term. Even with a winning strategy, you will go through losing periods — it's mathematically inevitable.
tipster.variance_p2: A tipster with a 60% success rate can string together 5 or 6 losing bets in a row. This is not a sign of failure — it's the statistical reality of sports betting. What matters is the balance over 500 to 1000 bets minimum.
tipster.variance_p3: That's exactly why we insist on bankroll management: never bet more than a fraction of your capital on a single bet, so you can absorb the bad runs and benefit from the good ones.
tipster.bk1_desc: Define your starting bankroll and unit value. Our tool automatically calculates your stakes in euros or units.
tipster.bk2_desc: Predictions are published in units (0.5U to 3U). The tipster adjusts the stake based on his conviction. No all-in bets, ever.
tipster.bk3_desc: Your bankroll updates automatically after each result. You see your capital's evolution in real time, in euros and units.
tipster.audience_for_1: You want a serious and disciplined approach
tipster.audience_for_2: You understand profitability is measured long-term
tipster.audience_for_3: You're ready to follow strict bankroll management
tipster.audience_for_4: You're looking for transparency and verifiable results
tipster.audience_for_5: You want a complete tool, not just a Telegram channel
tipster.audience_not_1: You want to get rich in a week
tipster.audience_not_3: You bet more than you can afford to lose
tipster.audience_not_4: You're looking for tips on 10+ odds
tipster.audience_not_5: You think betting is a game of chance
tipster.bookmakers_subtitle: Our predictions are placed on 6 different bookmakers to always get the best odds. To follow all our picks, sign up with each of them.
tipster.cta_desc_premium: You have access to all our premium predictions and the exclusive Telegram group.
tipster.cta_desc_logged: Go Premium to access all our selections and join the exclusive Telegram group.
tipster.cta_desc_guest: Free sign-up. Check our results, verify our transparency, then decide.

bookmakers_page.hero_subtitle: To follow all our predictions and never miss an opportunity, sign up with each of these 6 bookmakers. It's free and takes 2 minutes.
bookmakers_page.intl_subtitle: The best odds on the market, thousands of available markets, and high betting limits. Used by professional bettors worldwide.
bookmakers_page.anj_subtitle: Licensed by the French National Gaming Authority. Some of our best predictions are placed on these platforms. Sign up to not miss anything.
bookmakers_page.why1_desc: Our picks are placed on different bookmakers based on the best available odds. Without accounts everywhere, you miss opportunities.
bookmakers_page.why2_desc: Odds vary between bookmakers. By comparing, you can gain 5 to 15% more profit in the long run.
bookmakers_page.why3_desc: Each bookmaker offers a welcome bonus. By signing up with all 6, you start with a considerable advantage.
bookmakers_page.alert_title: ⚠️ Not being signed up with all bookmakers = missing winning predictions
bookmakers_page.alert_desc: Registration is free and without commitment on each platform. Do it now, you'll thank us later.
bookmakers_page.pro_p1: Profitable bettors never bet on a single bookmaker. They systematically compare odds and place each bet where the odds are highest. Over 100 bets, this habit can represent 10 to 20% additional profit.
bookmakers_page.pro_p2: Sign up with the 6 bookmakers above. It's free, takes a few minutes, and is the first step to following our predictions in the best conditions.
bookmakers_page.cta_premium: You're Premium — enjoy all our predictions
bookmakers_page.cta_logged: Go Premium to never miss out
bookmakers_page.cta_desc_premium: Check your predictions and track your performance.
bookmakers_page.cta_desc_guest: Create your free account and start following our predictions now.

bookmaker_slug.code_bonus_extra: Enter during sign-up — on top of the welcome bonus, receive extra free bets
bookmaker_slug.cta_desc_with_code: Sign up on {name} with code {code} and start following our predictions with the best odds on the market.
bookmaker_slug.cta_desc_no_code: Sign up on {name} and start following our predictions with the best odds on the market.
bookmaker_slug.1xbet_tagline: The best odds and a huge selection of sports bets
bookmaker_slug.1xbet_s1: 1xbet is a renowned international bookmaker, founded in 2007, known for offering an exceptional range of sports betting. Present worldwide, it has risen among market leaders thanks to some of the highest odds in the industry and an impressive catalog of sports: football, tennis, basketball, esports, horse racing and more.
bookmaker_slug.1xbet_s2: Unlike French regulated bookmakers, 1xbet imposes no restrictions on bet types, odds or bonuses. Odds are consistently higher than those offered by ARJEL bookmakers, resulting in significantly higher potential winnings for regular bettors. It's one of the most used bookmakers by professional tipsters.
bookmaker_slug.1xbet_s3: 1xbet allows deposits and withdrawals via cryptocurrencies (Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, etc.). Crypto transactions are fast, secure and confidential — without the delays and verifications of traditional banks. A major advantage for players who want to manage their bankroll efficiently.
bookmaker_slug.1xbet_s4: To access 1xbet from France, a VPN is required. Connect via Canada, Norway, Albania or Singapore. Once registered and connected, you can place your bets normally. Using a VPN is simple and quick — many free and paid solutions exist.
bookmaker_slug.1xbet_v1_desc: Discover the interface, features and advantages of 1xbet in this complete presentation.
bookmaker_slug.1xbet_v2_desc: Step-by-step guide to install the 1xbet app on your Android or iOS smartphone.
bookmaker_slug.1xbet_v3_desc: Install the 1xbet desktop app for an optimal experience with real-time alerts.
bookmaker_slug.1xbet_v4_desc: Sponsor of major clubs and international competitions — discover 1xbet's global presence.
bookmaker_slug.stake_tagline: The leading crypto platform for sports betting and casino
bookmaker_slug.stake_s1: Stake is an international sports betting and online casino platform that has established itself as the reference for crypto bettors. Ultra-modern interface, competitive odds, generous VIP program and active community — Stake offers a premium betting experience. It's one of the most used bookmakers by professional tipsters worldwide.
bookmaker_slug.stake_s2: Good news: the VPN is only needed during your first registration. Connect via Canada or Singapore to create your account. Once registered, you can log in and bet normally from anywhere, without a VPN. It's simple, fast, and you only do it once.
bookmaker_slug.stake_s3_title: How to sign up on Stake
bookmaker_slug.stake_s3: 1. Activate your VPN on Canada or Singapore. 2. Go to Stake via our affiliate link. 3. Click 'Sign up' and fill in the form (email, username, password). 4. Enter bonus code PRONOSCLUB within 24h of registration to unlock instant rakeback. 5. Verify your email. 6. Disable the VPN — you'll never need it again.
bookmaker_slug.stake_s4: Stake works exclusively with cryptocurrencies. We recommend USDC via Coinbase: very low volatility, ultra-fast transfers and minimal fees. Important rule: you withdraw in the same crypto used to deposit. The process is simple: buy USDC on Coinbase, transfer to Stake, and reverse to withdraw to your bank account.
bookmaker_slug.stake_s5: Stake offers a 15-level VIP program (Bronze to Obsidian). Each level unlocks additional bonuses: rakeback, weekly bonuses, monthly bonuses, reloads, and a dedicated VIP host from Platinum level. Sports bets count 3× more than casino bets for progression. Using code PRONOSCLUB, you unlock rakeback immediately without waiting for Bronze level.
bookmaker_slug.stake_s6: Rakeback lets you recover 5% of the house edge on every bet, win or lose. It's a considerable long-term advantage that reduces your losses and increases your profitability. Normally reserved for Bronze members, code PRONOSCLUB gives you immediate rakeback access from signup.
bookmaker_slug.stake_v1_title: How to sign up on Stake
bookmaker_slug.stake_v1_desc: Complete tutorial: VPN, registration, PRONOSCLUB bonus code, and first login.
bookmaker_slug.ps3838_tagline: The professional bettor's bookmaker — best odds with no restrictions
bookmaker_slug.ps3838_s1: PS3838 (formerly Pinnacle) is THE reference for professional bettors. Its odds are among the highest on the market and most importantly, PS3838 never limits winners. Unlike regular bookmakers that close profitable players' accounts, PS3838 welcomes all profiles. It's the bookmaker used by tipsters and high-level bettors worldwide.
bookmaker_slug.ps3838_s2: PS3838 is not directly accessible from France. To access it, you need to go through a broker: Asian Connect. It's a secure intermediary platform that lets you open a PS3838 account without VPN, without restrictions. Asian Connect serves as a link between you and the bookmaker — you deposit with Asian Connect, and your funds are available on PS3838.
bookmaker_slug.ps3838_s3: 1. Create an account on Asian Connect via our affiliate link. 2. In your dashboard, select PS3838 among the available bookmakers. 3. Asian Connect automatically creates your PS3838 account. 4. Make your first deposit via Skrill, Neteller or Bitcoin. 5. You receive your PS3838 credentials to log in directly and start betting.
bookmaker_slug.ps3838_s4: Asian Connect offers three payment methods: Skrill (e-wallet, fast transfers, no fees between Skrill and Asian Connect, bank withdrawal at €5.50), Neteller (similar to Skrill, simple and secure), and Bitcoin (fast, anonymous, ideal for large amounts). We recommend Skrill for its simplicity and low fees.
bookmaker_slug.ps3838_s5: Asian Connect offers a welcome bonus on your first deposit. Our advice: if you're a regular bettor, accept it — it increases your starting capital. If you prefer total flexibility without wagering requirements, you can decline it. Validation conditions are clearly displayed during registration.
bookmaker_slug.ps3838_s6: This is PS3838's major strength: no account limitations, no maximum bet reduction, no account closure for winning players. Where ARJEL bookmakers and even some international ones limit or ban profitable bettors, PS3838 welcomes them with open arms. That's why it's THE recommended bookmaker by professional tipsters.
bookmaker_slug.winamax_tagline: The undisputed leader of sports betting in France
bookmaker_slug.winamax_s1: Winamax is the most popular bookmaker in France. Founded in 1999, the platform offers sports betting and online poker with an intuitive interface, some of the best odds on the ARJEL market, and regular promotions. It's the natural choice for bettors in France who want a reliable, regulated and complete platform.
bookmaker_slug.winamax_s2: Among licensed French bookmakers, Winamax regularly offers the highest odds. Odds are updated in real time, and market diversity is impressive: singles, accumulators, handicap, total goals, individual performances, long-term bets. Football, tennis, basketball, rugby, eSport — everything is covered.
bookmaker_slug.winamax_s3: Winamax excels in live betting with real-time statistics and a complete dashboard. The cash-out feature lets you secure your winnings or minimize your losses before an event ends. Available pre-match and live, it's an essential strategic tool for regular bettors.
bookmaker_slug.winamax_s4: Winamax offers up to €100 refunded on your first bet. If your first bet loses, you're fully refunded as free bets. On top of this bonus, use our referral code BOLMXT to receive between €20 and €40 in extra free bets from your first deposit. Both stack — it's the best possible start on Winamax.
bookmaker_slug.winamax_s5: The Winamax app is available on Android and iOS. Smooth, fast and regularly updated, it gives access to all features: live betting, cash-out, account management, promotions. You can bet wherever you are in just a few clicks, even during major sporting events.
bookmaker_slug.winamax_s6: Winamax stands out with its unique social features. The 'Betting Wall' lets you share your bets, exchange tips and follow the best bettors' stakes. It's a true social network for sports betting that enhances the experience and community engagement.
bookmaker_slug.betclic_tagline: A major player in French sports betting since 2005
bookmaker_slug.betclic_s1: Betclic is one of the most reputed bookmakers in France and Europe. Founded in 2005 and ARJEL-licensed, it offers a modern interface, competitive odds and a very complete sports offering. Football, tennis, basketball, rugby, eSport — Betclic covers all major events with varied markets: singles, accumulators, handicap, individual performances and long-term bets.
bookmaker_slug.betclic_s2: Betclic stands out with odds often higher than its ARJEL competitors. Odds are updated in real time, adjusted based on event developments. It's a concrete advantage to maximize your winnings on big matches as well as lesser-known competitions.
bookmaker_slug.betclic_s3: Betclic offers live betting with odds that evolve in real time. The cash-out feature lets you secure your winnings or limit your losses before an event ends. It's an essential strategic tool for bettors who want to keep control over their stakes.
bookmaker_slug.betclic_s4: Betclic refunds your first bet up to €100 in free bets. If your first bet loses, you're fully refunded as free bets. Additionally, use our referral code BOLLLC1V during sign-up to receive extra free bets. Both advantages stack — it's the best possible start on Betclic.
bookmaker_slug.betclic_s5: The Betclic app is available on Android and iOS. It includes all site features: live betting, cash-out, promotions, account management. Smooth and regularly updated, it lets you bet anywhere, anytime, even during major competitions.
bookmaker_slug.betclic_s6: Betclic offers a wide variety of bets: single, accumulator, system, handicap, over/under, individual performances. This variety allows you to adapt your strategies to each event. Both beginner and experienced bettors find options ranging from the simplest to the most advanced.
bookmaker_slug.unibet_tagline: France's most complete bookmaker — sports, poker, racing and streaming
bookmaker_slug.unibet_s1: Unibet is one of the world's sports betting giants, founded in 1997 in Sweden and ARJEL-licensed since 2010. With over 14 million users worldwide, Unibet offers one of the most complete offerings on the French market: sports betting, poker, horse racing, and a unique streaming service with over 35,000 events broadcast live each year.
bookmaker_slug.unibet_s2: Unibet is the only French bookmaker to offer a stackable triple welcome bonus: up to €100 refunded as free bets on your first sports bet, €20 on horse racing and €250 poker bonus. That's up to €370 total to get started. Unibet free bets never expire — use them whenever you want.
bookmaker_slug.unibet_s3: Unibet offers the best streaming service on the French market with over 35,000 sporting events per year broadcast for free. Football (Serie A, La Liga, Bundesliga, Champions League), tennis (all 4 Grand Slams including exclusive US Open coverage), basketball (NBA), US sports and more. You just need a positive balance or to have bet in the last 24h.
bookmaker_slug.unibet_s4: Unibet innovates with unique features: MyBet to create your own accumulators on a single match, bet cancellation within 2 minutes (no fees), Goalscorer Insurance if your player is substituted in the first half, 2+ Insurance if your team leads by 2 goals, and Multimax offering up to 50% extra winnings on your accumulators.
bookmaker_slug.unibet_s5: Unibet ranks in the top 3 best ARJEL bookmakers for odds, alongside Winamax and Betclic. Odds are updated in real time and Super Boosted Odds are offered daily on the biggest sporting events. Over 30 sports disciplines are covered with markets ranging from the simplest to the most advanced.
bookmaker_slug.unibet_s6: The Unibet app is the highest-rated on the App Store in France for sports betting. Available on Android and iOS, it offers a smooth and intuitive interface with access to all bets, live streaming, cash-out, promotions and complete account management. Bet wherever you are, anytime.
